summary: All 5 characters research-complete and personality-locked. Tesla and da Vinci priority for test deployment (visual distinctiveness + high engagement). GPU blocker prevents Splat generation—all characters queued for post-GPU phase.

characters.name: Nikola Tesla

readiness_assessment.splat_readiness: 50% (design ready, Splat generation blocked by GPU)

characters.visual_distinctiveness: HIGH — Tall, lean, sharp features, intense piercing eyes, impeccable dress. Highly recognizable silhouette.
characters.voice_personality: Precise, technical, poetic about invention. Strong character voice for Convai synthesis.
characters.engagement_potential: LARGE — STEM audiences, sci-fi communities, innovation-focused, mystery narratives
characters.test_deployment_priority: P0 — Recommend as FIRST test character (visual clarity + engagement)
characters.notes: Best candidate for MVP test. Clear historical record, distinctive appearance, strong voice profile. No cultural sensitivities.

characters.name: Leonardo da Vinci

readiness_assessment.splat_readiness: 50% (design ready, Splat generation blocked by GPU)

characters.visual_distinctiveness: VERY HIGH — Flowing beard, intense gaze, Renaissance dress, notebook. Immediately iconic.
characters.voice_personality: Poetic, scientific, scattered-brilliant, philosophical. Strong character voice.
characters.engagement_potential: LARGE — Art lovers, STEM audiences, creativity communities, philosophy. Cross-demographic reach.
characters.test_deployment_priority: P0 — Recommend as SECOND test character (highest cross-demographic appeal)
characters.notes: Highest engagement breadth. Polymath appeal transcends single audience. Clear visual language. Excellent for demonstrating cross-demographic revenue potential.

characters.name: Charles Darwin

readiness_assessment.splat_readiness: 40% (design ready, Splat generation blocked by GPU; note: may polarize some audiences)

deployment_gates_status.gate_6_content_gate_verified: ⚠ CONDITIONAL PASS (evolution topic may require disclaimer for some markets)

characters.visual_distinctiveness: HIGH — Distinctive beard, kind but penetrating eyes, Victorian formal dress. Clear aging arc.
characters.voice_personality: Thoughtful, careful, scientific but humble. Strong introspective quality.
characters.engagement_potential: LARGE — Science education, evolution/biology, history of science, philosophy. Note: may polarize religious communities.
characters.test_deployment_priority: P1 — Deploy after Tesla/da Vinci (higher risk/polarization)
characters.notes: Strong educational appeal. Evolution topic may require audience-specific framing. Consider separate content tier for markets with religious sensitivity. Excellent for science education channels.

characters.name: Marie Curie

readiness_assessment.splat_readiness: 50% (design ready, Splat generation blocked by GPU)

deployment_gates_status.gate_6_content_gate_verified: ✓ PASS (SFW-only historical, potential inspiration hook for women in STEM)

characters.visual_distinctiveness: MEDIUM-HIGH — Petite build, serious expression, simple practical dress. Aging arc notable. Less visually iconic than Tesla/da Vinci but strong presence.
characters.voice_personality: Thoughtful, scientific, warm. Passion about women in science. Slight French accent potential.
characters.engagement_potential: LARGE — STEM education, women in science advocacy, historical biography, inspirational narratives
characters.test_deployment_priority: P1 — Deploy after Tesla/da Vinci (solid performer, niche strength in women-in-STEM demographic)
characters.notes: Strong educational appeal, particularly for women-in-STEM initiatives. Unique angle on engagement. Less visually distinctive than Tesla/da Vinci but strong in specific demographics.

characters.name: Galileo Galilei

readiness_assessment.splat_readiness: 40% (design ready, Splat generation blocked by GPU; note: may polarize religious audiences)

deployment_gates_status.gate_6_content_gate_verified: ⚠ CONDITIONAL PASS (religion/science conflict may require disclaimers for some markets)

characters.visual_distinctiveness: HIGH — Bearded man, sharp features, intelligent eyes, period clothing. Defiant energy. Clear aging arc (blindness in later years).
characters.voice_personality: Direct, challenging, passionate. Bold and defiant but reflective. Strong character voice.
characters.engagement_potential: LARGE — Science education, history of science, free-thought communities, philosophy. Note: may polarize religious audiences.
characters.test_deployment_priority: P2 — Deploy after initial market test (religious sensitivity similar to Darwin)
characters.notes: Strong in science/philosophy/free-thought demographics. Religious conflict narrative adds depth but requires audience awareness. Good for secular education markets.

phase_2_expanded_deployment: 4. Charles Darwin (P1 — evolution/science education, note polarization risk)
5. Galileo Galilei (P2 — religion/science narrative, note polarization risk)

blockers_and_dependencies.primary_blocker: GPU Hardware (RTX 3060 12GB) — Blocks all Splat generation
blockers_and_dependencies.secondary_blocker: Convai SDK integration in Unreal Engine — Ready once Splats are generated

pre_gpu: → Design Splat acquisition plan per character (photo sourcing, reference collection)
→ Prepare Polycam/Scaniverse workflows for post-GPU phase
post_gpu: → Generate Splats for Phase 1 (Tesla, da Vinci)
→ Integrate with Convai SDK in Unreal Engine
